name: Storz & Bickel Filling Pads
summary: The Filling Pad is designed to prevent herbs from shifting and falling through the holes in the Filling Chamber.
description: The Filling Pad is designed to prevent herbs from shifting and falling through the holes in the Filling Chamber. This gap-filling accessory is especially useful for finely ground herbs. Tailored for use with the following devices. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
